overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a foggy gothic cathedral courtyard in a video game. The camera moves through a covered stone corridor, emerges into an open courtyard with tall arched windows, and approaches a wooden door. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with torch lighting and dense fog.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, foggy stone corridor with gothic architecture. Wall-mounted torches provide the primary illumination as the camera approaches a large decorated archway at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open gothic courtyard with central fountain and upper balconies

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the foggy open courtyard with visible sky above
camera pans upward to view the upper balconies and tall windows against the foggy sky

agents.ego_description: walking into the courtyard and looking around at the surrounding architecture and upper levels

stone balcony with gothic arches on the upper level of the building
tall gothic window with diamond lattice pattern reaching multiple stories
stone bench positioned against the courtyard wall

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into a spacious foggy courtyard surrounded by gothic architecture. The scene opens to reveal a central planter, stone benches, and towering lattice windows. The camera pans upward to take in the upper balconies before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone walkway approaching wooden door with potted plants

events.description: turning into the side passage and approaching the large wooden door

large ornate planter with dense green foliage beside the walkway
stone balustrade lining the narrow approach to the door

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrower side passage leading to a large wooden door. The walkway is flanked by stone railings and potted plants, with a wall torch providing illumination. The segment ends as the camera approaches the detailed wooden door with its arched stone frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic stone passage into a vast gothic courtyard before narrowing again toward a final entrance. It begins within a narrow, foggy corridor where wall-mounted torches cast a dim glow as the camera advances toward a large decorated archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the space suddenly expands into a spacious, mist-shrouded courtyard featuring a central planter, stone benches, and towering lattice windows that draw the gaze upward toward high balconies. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the open center into a narrower side passage flanked by stone railings and potted plants. Finally, guided by the light of another wall torch, the movement concludes as the camera approaches a detailed wooden door set within an arched stone frame.
